data.body: E6 harness BUILT (subagent): e6_metrics.py (259 LOC pure) + e6_judge_reliability.py (660 LOC driver) + test_e6_agreement.py (14 tests pass) + e6_prereg.json + frozen inputs (50 self-consistency findings, 14x3 order-shuffle) + README. Subagent INDEPENDENTLY hit+fixed the linked-worktree isolation trap (git clone --local, copies .env-id init marker, asserts .git isdir, HEAD-unchanged check) — confirms the E2 finding is real+obvious. Deterministic ACs pass; LLM-eval ACs pending. Eval = run-a (150 agentic pass2_verify calls, 50 findings x3 votes) + run-b (42 review_plan runs, 14 plans x3 perms) + analyze; resumable. LAUNCHED E6 run-a (bg, --repo-root cal-e6, smoke-test health-check running). E2 review round-3 running (isolation fix). E3 build running (with correction).
